captures.description: The editor as it opens: live preview beside the panel, headline hovered (click-to-edit affordance)
Headline clicked in the preview: the matching editor opens in the panel
Headline edit saved: the Now → After review opens inside the editor (it stays in place), preview already updated
Keep pressed: the change moves to the "Kept this session" list; nothing is live yet
A second edit (the hero tag) discarded from the in-place review: the experiment is gone, the editor stays open, the kept change survives
The "Add a page…" menu: the developer-blessed page blueprints
The Content page blueprint form, filled in (a "Care Guide" page) but not yet submitted
Create preview pressed: the whole new page is pending, shown in the preview like any other change
The new page kept: two changes staged, the new "Care Guide" entry visible in the preview menu
Publish pressed: the whole session goes live as one unit (one real git commit, pushed)
Undo last publish: the whole published session reverted in one click, preview back to the original
